positive: A stylish, minimalist illustration featuring a whimsical forest scene. The main subject is a collection of interconnected, stylized bioluminescent mushrooms and foliage, forming a symmetrical, woodland pattern. The aesthetic should be inspired by Art Nouveau and negative space design, utilizing deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and pops of soft, glowing cyan light. The style must be vector illustration, highly graphic, with clean, bold silhouettes and crisp line work suitable for screen printing on apparel. Strong contrast is key, ensuring the glowing elements pop against a darker background. Composition must be centrally focused and highly repeatable, suggesting a seamless pattern.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, logo, text, trademark, blurry, noise, artifact, watermarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, low contrast, grayscale
